violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food items on floor in walk in freezer.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Bucket sanitizer too low. Dispenser at 150-200 ppm QA. Service as needed.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Chemical spray bottles in cleaning closet not labeled.
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. New manager scheduled to take over store mid November.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in coolers need cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cabinets, counters, shelving units need cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood system needs cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning in kitchen & walk in units.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
